comment: Change 'audioProvider' to 'firebase' when switching to Firebase Storage. No code changes needed!

forest.name: Forest Sounds
forest.description: Ambient forest sounds and bird chirping

instructions.updateS3Urls:
1. Upload new MP3 to your S3 bucket
2. Copy the S3 URL below
3. Replace the 's3Url' value
4. Save this file
5. Restart the app
instructions.updateFirebaseUrls:
1. Upload new MP3 to Firebase Storage
2. Copy the Firebase URL below
3. Replace the 'firebaseUrl' value
4. Save this file
5. Restart the app
instructions.switchProviders: Change 'audioProvider' from 's3' to 'firebase' (or vice versa) to switch storage backends
